---
title: "Meta-Analysis Report"
output: html_document
params:
  result: NULL
  include_code: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = params$include_code)
```

# Summary

```{r}
summary(params$result)
```

# Forest Plot

```{r, echo=FALSE}
forest(params$result)
```

# Funnel Plot

```{r, echo=FALSE}
funnel(params$result)
```
